ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Full name of the company associated with the stock */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company belongs to */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company belongs to */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Current market capitalization of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock for which the price is recorded */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on that date */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on that date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on that date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on that date */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Total volume of shares traded on that date */,
  "trading_hours" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the stock was traded during regular hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the stock exchange */,
  "trading_hours" TEXT /* Trading hours of the stock exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock to monitor */,
  "threshold_price" REAL /* Price threshold for triggering the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price increase, price decrease) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of alerts (e.g., real-time, daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the transaction */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being purchased */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of shares bought or sold */,
  "price_per_share" REAL /* Price per share at the time of transaction */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the transaction */,
  "brokerage_fee" REAL /* Brokerage fee for the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the market index */,
  "base_year" INTEGER /* Base year for the index calculation */,
  "index_type" TEXT /* Type of index (e.g., price-weighted, market-capitalization-weighted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "index_values" (
  "index_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index value record */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market index */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the index value */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the index on that date */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in the index value from the previous day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_index_values_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES market_indices ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock for which the historical data is recorded */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the historical record */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock on that date */,
  "adjustment_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the adjustment (e.g., stock split, merger) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock for which the prediction is made */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date of the prediction */,
  "predicted_price" REAL /* Predicted price for the stock */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model used for making the prediction */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_predictions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock related to the news article */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_calendar" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock related to the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., earnings announcement, conference call) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_calendar_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
